title: 15 integration tests no-op (silently pass) when data/kaggle is absent
evidence: tests/integration.rs:50,68,85,99,... — `if !have_data() { return; }` guards 15 of 22 integration tests; with no dataset they pass without asserting. Data IS present in this run (data/kaggle has all 6 CSVs) and test_coverage=1.0, so they executed here.
suggestion: Make the dataset a hard test fixture (fail if missing) or gate these behind `#[ignore]` so a missing dataset is visible rather than a green no-op.

title: Date-range filter lets undated matches bypass the bound
evidence: src/db.rs:303-311 — date_from/date_to checks are skipped when `m.date.is_empty()`, so matches without a date are always included in a date-bounded query.
suggestion: Decide explicitly whether undated matches should be excluded from a date-bounded query; document or filter them out.

title: Fuzzy team resolution can pick an unintended club on short/ambiguous input
evidence: src/db.rs:253-270 — substring match falls back to the key whose length is closest to the query; an ambiguous short query could resolve to the wrong club without surfacing the ambiguity.
suggestion: When multiple keys match, surface the candidates or require disambiguation instead of silently choosing the nearest-length key.

title: Stored maintainability score is low (0.416) despite passing build/tests
evidence: scores.json: maintainability=0.4164 (code_quality=0.833, idiomatic=0.82, test_coverage=1.0). Likely reflects large per-file/function size (db.rs ~530 lines, mcp.rs ~528 lines) rather than a correctness defect.
suggestion: Informational only — no action required for conformance; noted for cross-run comparison.

title: BR-Football-Dataset loaded only for Série B/C (deliberate de-dup choice)
evidence: src/loader.rs:231-236 — Série A and Copa rows in BR-Football-Dataset.csv are skipped to avoid double-counting the authoritative dedicated files; only Série B/C (with shots/corners extras) are loaded.
suggestion: Reasonable design to prevent triple-counting; documented in-code. No change needed.
